dct_title_s: Theatrum Terræ Sanctæ et biblicarum historiarum : cum tabulis geographicis ære expressis
dct_alternative_sm: Theatrvm Terræ Sanctæ et biblicarvm historiarvm
Adrichem, Christiaan van, 1533-1585. Theatrum Terrae Sancae
dct_description_sm: Gold-leafed decorative borders and seals on front and back covers; gold-leafed and floral patterned fore-edge.
First 2 and last 2 pages blank (included in page description.)
Engraved title page, head and tail-pieces throughout.
"Cum gratia et privilegio" on titile page.
Descriptive text accompanies maps (including index numbers); descriptive text on maps.
Decorative cartouches, banners, compass roses, bar scales.
Maps show topography, vegetation, waterways, routes.
Illustrations of settlements, figures, fauna, ships, sea monsters.
Map 12 is a bird's eye view, including city plan of Jerusalem (title translation: Jerusalem, and its surroundings, as it was at the time of Christ).

Map 1. Situs Terræ Promissionis SS bibliorum intelligentiam exacte aperiens / per Christianum Adrichomium Delphum -- Map 2. Tribus Aser : id est, portio illa Terræ Sanctæ, quæ Tribui Aser in divisione regionis attributa fuit -- Map 3. Tribus Ephraim, Beniamin, et, Dan : iste videlicet Terræ Sanctæ tractus, qui in regionis partitione istis tribus tribubus datus est -- Map 4. Tribus Gad : nempe, ea Terræ Sanctę pars, quæ obtigit in partitione regionis tribui Gad -- Map 5. Tribus Zabulon, Isachar, et Dimidia Manasse : altera, hoc est, illæTerræ Sanctæ regiones, quas istę tribus in distribuendo possidendas acceperunt -- Map 6. Tribus Iuda : id est, pars illa Terræ Sanctæ, quam in ingressu Tribus Iuda consecuta fuit -- Map 7. Dimidia Tribus Manasse : hoc est, ea Terræ Sanctæ pars, quam Manassæ dimidia tribus in regionis divisione obtinuit -- Map 8. Tribus Neptalim : videlicet, ea Terræ Sanctæ pars, quam in divisione regionis tribus Naptalim accepit -- Map 9. Pharan deserturm, et consinia eius cum parte Ægypti : ea videlicet terræ regio, in qua filii Israël post exitum de Ægypto, triginta octo annis vagati sunt antequam terram promissam ingrederentur -- Map 10. Tribus Ruben : goc est, ea Terræ Sanctæ regio, quę in dividendo tribui Rubẽ assignata est -- Map 11. Tribus Simeon : nempre ea Terræ Sanctæ portio, quam tribus Simeon in ingressu nacta fuit -- Map 12. Ierusalem, et suburbia eius, sicut tempre Christi floruit, cum locis, in quibus Christ passus est: quæ religiose à Christianis observata, etiã nũ Venerationi habentur / descripta per Christianum Adrichom Delphum
